job_title: View job: Scientist 2-Spatial Biology and Biophysics
job_description:
• 3+ years of relevant experience in situ hybridization, imaging and spatial techniques, preferably in the Biotechnology industry.
• Strong analytical background Strong organizational skills.
• Strong written and oral communication skills.
• Strong troubleshooting and problem solving skills.
• Experience with the 10x Genomics Xenium platform is a plus.
• Skills in image analysis are a plus.
• PhD in Molecular Biology, Biophysics, Physical Chemistry or related field.
• Proven ability to design novel molecular biology assay schemes, as evidenced by peer-reviewed publications or published patents.

Electromechanical Design Location Heidelberg, Baden-Wurttemberg, Germany Category Research & Development Global Technology Owner, Power Electronics Available in one of 3 locations Category Research & Development Senior Software Engineer Location Plzen, Plzeňský kraj, Czechia Category Research & Development Power Electronics Quality and Reliability Senior R&D Engineer for SST (f/m/d) 80-100% Location Baden-Daettwil, Aargau, Switzerland Category Research & Development Applied Physicist (80%-100%) Location Baden-Daettwil, Aargau, Switzerland Category Research & Development (Senior) Research Scientist in Software Systems Engineering (80-100%) Location Baden-Daettwil, Aargau, Switzerland Category Research & Development Degree (MSc or equivalent) in Electrical Engineering or a related fieldProven experience in programmable logic design (VHDL) and strong expertise in FPGA architecturesKnowledge of power electronic systems is considered an assetExperience in testing methodologies and software development processes is an advantageFluency in both written and spoken German and English is requiredStructured, analytical work style combined with strong communication skills, enabling effective collaboration in interdisciplinary project teams Customer events News & media Who we are Innovation Careers Sustainability Supplying EEO and Affirmative Action Responsible for the development and the testing of complex FPGA Firmware (VHDL) for traction and auxiliary converters in railway applicationsFeasibility studies, simulation, implementation, testing and documentation according to traction development processesProvide technical support and advisory to internal customersWork in interdisciplinary project teams with engineers from power electronics and control domainsContribute and draft leading-edge development processes to enhance future success of the team.
